paper_title: Effects of partial replacement of fishmeal protein by protein extracted from green seaweed (Cladophoraceae) in mudskipper (Pseudapocryptes elongatus) diets

entities.id: Replacement of fishmeal protein in mudskipper diets
entities.description: The main research problem investigating alternative protein sources for Pseudapocryptes elongatus.

entities.description: The experimental dietary formulations with varying replacement levels (0, 15, 30, 45, and 60%).
